title: Safety First Aid Group Workplace First Aid Kit British Standard (Small 1-25 Persons) Wall Mountable with Inspection Tags and Extra Plasters
features: Fully-stocked first aid kit from a leading UK manufacturer specifically designed for the busy office, kitchen, construction site or any other active workplace
Features inspection tags and tamper-proof studs to ensure the kit is regularly maintained
Includes 100 additional assorted washproof plasters, allowing for less frequent repurchasing of these high-use items
Kit is made easily visible and accessible by the included wall bracket, which includes a “First Aid Kit Missing” label to alert you if the case has been moved
Small kit is supplied in a durable moisture and dust-proof 30cm x 23cm x 12cm Evolution case
description: The Evolution Plus BS Workplace Kit, Small provides everything you need to facilitate comprehensive workplace first aid to small workplaces. It is compliant with British Standard requirements for first aid kits. This kit has been carefully compiled with workplaces in mind to ensure that you have an easy-to-use first aid solution ready for emergencies. The wall bracket ensures your first aid kit is easily locatable, and includes a "First Aid Kit Missing" sign to alert you if the case is in use or missing. The portable and durable Evolution case protects first aid supplies from dust and moisture. Included inspection tags help you to keep on top of your first aid supplies by reminding you to frequently check for missing or expired supplies. Also includes 100 additional assorted washproof plasters to ensure your kit stays compliant as these frequent-use items are depleted. The Evolution Plus BS Workplace Kit is also available in the following sizes: - Medium - Large
